summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Dome City Temperature Control System. Backend REST APIs working perfectly (100% success), frontend UI components all functional, but WebSocket real-time connection failing due to routing issues.

critical_bugs.issue: WebSocket endpoint returns 404 Not Found - ingress routing not configured for WebSocket connections
critical_bugs.impact: Prevents real-time data updates and live dashboard functionality

integration_issues.issue: WebSocket connection fails to establish, preventing Dashboard Connected toast and real-time updates

design_issues.issue: Temperature chart shows sizing warnings in console

passed_tests: Backend API Health Check - GET /api/ returns proper message
Backend Status endpoint - GET /api/status returns complete arduino_data structure
Backend History endpoint - GET /api/history returns empty history array (expected)
Backend Ports endpoint - GET /api/ports returns available ports with connected: false
Backend Mode endpoints - All POST /api/mode/* endpoints return proper 503 Arduino not connected
Frontend dashboard loads with all components visible
LED status indicators display correctly (4 LEDs: red, yellow, green, blue)
Mode control buttons (Emergency, Comfort, Stop) are visible and clickable
Temperature displays show correct values (0.0°C current, 23.0°C target, 0.0% humidity)
Fan and Heater status displays show OFF (expected)
Target temperature input accepts numerical values
Temperature chart container is present with proper dimensions
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Arduino data structure validation passes completely
Expected disconnected state properly handled (Arduino COM4 not available)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix WebSocket routing configuration. The WebSocket endpoint /api/ws returns 404, preventing real-time dashboard updates. This needs ingress/proxy configuration to support WebSocket upgrade requests. All other functionality working correctly.
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (11/11 tests passed), Frontend UI: 95% (WebSocket connection failing), Overall Integration: 85%
